title: CenterPoint (CNP) Q2 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates

title: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Q2 Earnings Miss, Revenues Down Y/Y
text: CenterPoint Energy's (CNP) second-quarter 2023 adjusted earnings lag the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.4%. Revenues decline by 3.5% from the year-ago figure.

title: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.28 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.29 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.31 per share a year ago.

title: CenterPoint Energy second-quarter profit drops 41%
text: CenterPoint Energy Inc on Thursday reported a 41% fall in second-quarter profit and increased its annual capital plan by 11% to $4 billion.

title: CenterPoint Energy Reports Continued Strong Earnings Results, Reiterates 2023 Guidance, and Raises 2023 Capital Plan
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) or “CenterPoint” today reported income available to common shareholders of $106 million, or $0.17 per diluted share on a GAAP basis for the second quarter of 2023. This income included loss and expense of $74 million, or $0.12 per share, related to the divestiture of Energy Systems Group, LLC. This is compared to $0.28 of diluted EPS for the second quarter of 2022, which included a one-time, $0.03 per share expense associated with t.

title: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: CenterPoint Energy declares regular Common Stock dividend of $0.1900 and Series A Preferred Stock dividend of $30.6250
text: HOUSTON , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CenterPoint Energy, Inc.'s (NYSE: CNP) board of directors today declared dividends on shares of its Common Stock and Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock. Common Stock Dividend The company's board of directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.1900 per share on the issued and outstanding shares of Common Stock payable on September 14, 2023 to shareholders of record at the close of business on August 17, 2023.

title: CenterPoint Energy: Delivering Electricity In Texas
text: Texas is the largest electricity market in the United States, with steadily growing demand setting records in 2023. We review the largely deregulated Texas market, and identify eight publicly traded investor-owned utilities with significant operations in Texas. CenterPoint Energy, Inc. is number two in the preferred transmission and distribution market segment, and provides the most concentrated focus on Texas.

title: CenterPoint's (CNP) Indiana Clients to See Reduced Electric Bills
text: CenterPoint's (CNP) customers are set to see savings in their electric bills from first-of-its-kind financing in Indiana.
